text_overlays.content_summary: Brand name 'ذرة فكيه' (Fakieh Corn) displayed in orange serif font within white frame
Footer text 'حمل تطبيق الطازج' (Download Al-Tazaj app) with app store links

notable_visual_elements: repeating corn kernel pattern creates visual rhythm
polaroid-style white frame emphasizes product as hero
palm tree logo (brand identifier) top left
color blocking: bright orange background creates strong brand presence
professional macro photography of corn texture

hospitality_cues: fresh corn offering signals quality ingredient sourcing
brand emphasis on 'Tazaj' (Fresh) aligns with Saudi hospitality value of quality provisions
cultural_notes.free_notes: Clean, minimalist product showcase typical of modern fast-casual Saudi chains. The corn-focused menu item (grilled corn) is secondary/side offering for a grill-focused brand. Polaroid aesthetic adds contemporary appeal while maintaining professional quality.

pattern_matches.notes: Corn kernels fill entire frame in macro detail, framed as Polaroid-style hero shot
Repeating corn kernel rows create visual texture and pattern consistency across frame
Menu item showcase with app download CTA suggests menu expansion or seasonal feature
